title: The Young and the Damned
posterAlt: The Young and the Damned (1950) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A group of juvenile delinquents live a violent life in the infamous slums of Mexico City; among them Pedro, whose morality is gradually corrupted and destroyed by the others.
synopsis: Released in 1950, The Young and the Damned is a drama and crime film in Spanish. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. A standout of 1950s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
